title: Root route has no regression test coverage
reasoning: The `/` route is implemented as a thin wrapper around `ScrollJourney`, but no tests are included for this feature. Given this route is the homepage and depends on a nontrivial imported section component, regressions such as import breakage, render-time exceptions, or accidental route replacement would not be caught before release.
recommendation: Add a homepage smoke test that renders `app/page.tsx` and asserts the route mounts without throwing, plus at least one user-visible contract assertion for the homepage shell.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No linked tests were provided for this feature despite the project defining a test runner in `package.json`.
suggestedRegressionTest: Create a Vitest test for `app/page.tsx` that mocks `@/components/sections/ScrollJourney`, renders `Home()`, and asserts the mocked section is present.
minimumFixScope: Add one route-level test file covering `app/page.tsx`.
